title: Sunken Treasury
description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are [blue]2[/blue] [gold]chests[/gold] but only [blue]1[/blue] [jitter][purple]brittle key[/purple][/jitter].

[gold]The First Chest:[/gold] Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!
notes: Both [gold]gold[/gold] amounts are randomized at event creation: the [gold]First Chest[/gold] yields [blue]52[/blue]–[blue]67[/blue] gold (base 60 ±8), and the [gold]Second Chest[/gold] yields [blue]303[/blue]–[blue]363[/blue] gold (base 333 ±30). Choosing the Second Chest permanently adds the [red]Greed[/red] curse to your deck. After taking it, your character delivers a gold-fever monologue.
